
---
title: "Awards & Honors"
description-meta: "Awards, Scholarships and Academic Honors"
toc: false
page-navigation: false
---

<style>

#quarto-margin-sidebar,
#TOC,
.sidebar,
.toc,
nav[role="doc-toc"]{
    display:none !important;
}

main.content{
    max-width:950px !important;
}

.intro{
    font-size:18px;
    line-height:1.8;
    color:#000;
    margin-bottom:40px;
}

.year{
    font-size:30px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:#0B57D0;
    margin-top:30px;
    margin-bottom:20px;
    border-bottom:2px solid #0B57D0;
    width:85%;
    padding-bottom:8px;
}

.award{
    margin-bottom:35px;
}

.award-title{
    font-size:23px;
    font-weight:bold;
    color:#8B0000;
    margin-bottom:8px;
}

.award-number{
    color:#000;
    font-weight:bold;
    margin-right:8px;
}

.award-org{
    font-size:17px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:#444;
    margin-bottom:10px;
}

.award-desc{
    font-size:17px;
    color:#000;
    line-height:1.8;
    text-align:justify;
}

</style>

<div class="intro">

<em>I am grateful to have received several awards, scholarships and recognitions throughout my academic journey. These honours reflect my commitment to academic excellence, leadership, teaching, and continuous personal development.</em>

</div>

<div class="year">
2025
</div>

<div class="award">

<div class="award-title">
<span class="award-number">7.</span>Best Student Teaching Assistant Award
</div>

<div class="award-org">
Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science, University of Ghana
</div>

<div class="award-desc">
Awarded in recognition of outstanding performance, dedication, and excellence as a student teaching assistant in the Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science.
</div>

</div>

<div class="award">

<div class="award-title">
<span class="award-number">6.</span>Sadhu T. L. Vaswani / Indian Association of Ghana Endowment Fund Award
</div>

<div class="award-org">
Overall Best Graduating Student in Economics, University of Ghana
</div>

<div class="award-desc">
Awarded as the top-ranking graduate in the Economics Department in recognition of sustained intellectual excellence and unrivaled coursework performance, despite navigating significant socio-economic and financial constraints.
</div>

</div>

<div class="year">
2024
</div>

<div class="award">

<div class="award-title">
<span class="award-number">5.</span>Overall Best Level 200 Student in Economics
</div>

<div class="award-org">
Vice-Chancellor's Ceremony in Honour of Award Winners, University of Ghana
</div>

<div class="award-desc">
Recognized as the Overall Best Level 200 Student in Economics for the 2022/2023 Academic Year in acknowledgement of exceptional academic performance.
</div>

</div>

<div class="year">
2023
</div>

<div class="award">

<div class="award-title">
<span class="award-number">4.</span>Overall Best Level 200 Student in Statistics and Actuarial Science
</div>

<div class="award-org">
School of Physical and Mathematical Sciences, University of Ghana
</div>

<div class="award-desc">
Awarded as the Overall Best Level 200 Student in the Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science for the 2022/2023 Academic Year.
</div>

</div>

<div class="year">
2022
</div>

<div class="award">

<div class="award-title">
<span class="award-number">3.</span>Fondazione Edu Scholarship
</div>

<div class="award-org">
University of Ghana Financial Aid Office
</div>

<div class="award-desc">
Recipient of the Fondazione Edu Scholarship on the basis of academic merit and demonstrated financial need to support my undergraduate education.
</div>

</div>

<div class="year">
2018–2020
</div>

<div class="award">

<div class="award-title">
<span class="award-number">2.</span>Excellence Club Award
</div>

<div class="award-org">
Potsin T.I. Ahmadiyya Senior High School
</div>

<div class="award-desc">
Recognized for outstanding academic performance by consistently obtaining a minimum of six Grade A's in eight subjects every academic semester.
</div>

</div>

<div class="year">
2016–2017
</div>

<div class="award">

<div class="award-title">
<span class="award-number">1.</span>Inter-School & Inter-Cluster Quiz Champion
</div>

<div class="award-org">
Central Region, Ghana
</div>

<div class="award-desc">
Won multiple inter-school and inter-cluster quiz competitions, demonstrating excellence in mathematics, science, teamwork and critical thinking.
</div>

</div>
